challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p element at the end of your .daily-value element.
Your new p element should have the class attribute set to no-divider.
Your new p element should have the text Potassium 235mg 6%.
Your new p element should have a span element.

description: Kreiraj konačni element p za svoj deo .daily-value. Daj mu tekst Potassium 235mg 6%. Poravnaj tekst 6% desno i ukloni donju ivicu elementa p.
